season_info.title: Season Information
season_info.description: Mustard grows well in cool dry weather with timely irrigation and balanced sulphur nutrition.

location_note.title: Local Variation Note
location_note.message: Oilseed crops are sensitive to waterlogging and often benefit from sulphur, calcium, or boron depending on soil status.

fertilizer_section.title: Recommended Inputs
micronutrients: Gypsum or sulphur source where needed

season_advice.title: Season Guidance
season_advice.rainy_season: Avoid excess soil moisture and late sowing from unseasonal rain.
season_advice.dry_season: Irrigate at flowering and siliqua development if needed.
season_advice.winter_season: Winter season is best suited for mustard cultivation.

application_section.title: Application Method
application_section.frequency: At sowing and early vegetative stage

water_management.title: Water Management
tips: Maintain light to moderate moisture during flowering

warnings.title: Important Warnings
points: Do not irrigate heavily during maturity
